metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_660
metadata.comment:
Rationale: Fig.3
NTT4/RXT-1 localizes to synaptic vesicles in striatal subcellular fractions from rat synaptosomes.

The pattern of NTT4/RXT-1 immunoreactivity (Western Blot) is similar to the one of the synaptic vesicle protein synaptophysin (Fig 3).

Antibody: purified rb polyclonal anti-Rxt1 (No KO control, but specificity was tested in an earlier study - see link above)

Fig.4-8
Two procedures were used for immunolabelling: immunoperoxidase and silver-intensified immunogold.

Antibody: purified rb polyclonal anti-Rxt1 (No KO control, but specificity was tested in an earlier study - see link above).

6/6/2017 Pim
- Protein has TM domains (Uniprot) justifying an "integral component... " extension.. Experimental description: FIG. 3. Western blotting detection of Rxt1, RDAT and synaptophysin in rat striatal subcellular fractions. Rat striatal subcellular fractions were prepared...

Fig.4-8
Adult male Sprague-Dawley rats (250 ± 50 g) were deeply anaesthetized by sodium pentobarbital (50 mg/kg, i.p.) and perfused...
